edition.dagbeeld: De dreiging van een breder oorlogsfront domineert: Trump kondigt nieuwe militaire actie aan tegen Iran, terwijl Europa zijn defensiecoöperatie met Oekraïne uitbouwt en westerse landen Rusland aanspreken op cyberaanvallen. Op de achtergrond tekent zich een institutionele strijd af — van het ICC tot de Apple-OpenAI-rechtszaak en een nieuw leiderschap in Labour.

article.title: Trump notifies Congress of new war against Iran
article.summary: President Donald Trump's notification that the U.S. is again at war with Iran gives the administration another 60-day clock for military action.

opening.note: Trump meldt aan Congres dat VS opnieuw in oorlog zijn met Iran — 60-dagenklok loopt.
opening.label: breaking

article.title: ‘Coalition of the willing’ to build shared European anti-ballistic programme
article.summary: Ukraine and nine other countries including UK issue joint statement as leaders meet Volodymyr Zelenskyy in Paris

front.note: Negen landen plus VK zetten multinationale ballistische defensie op met Oekraïne.
front.label: analyse

article.title: Trump Administration Announces New Attack on the International Criminal Court
article.summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said that the United States will “dismantle” the international court that tries grave crimes “brick by brick, if necessary.”

front.note: Rubio kondigt stap-voor-stap ontmanteling van het ICC aan.
front.label: breaking

article.title: Andy Burnham secures Labour leadership with landslide support of MPs
article.summary: Additional 27 nominations mean it is impossible for any other candidate to launch leadership challenge

front.note: Andy Burnham wint Labour-leiderschap met ongekende parlementaire steun.
front.label: breaking

article.title: Apple snoeihard in aanklacht tegen OpenAI: bedrijf van Altman zou bedrijfsgeheimen hebben gestolen

front.note: Apple beschuldigt OpenAI van stelen van bedrijfsgeheimen via oud-medewerker.
front.label: scoop

article.title: Russia's FSB blamed for Poland grid attack as UK and EU impose first joint cyber sanctions
article.summary: The allies blamed Center 16, the FSB’s signals intelligence arm, for acts of attempted cyber sabotage targeting Poland’s energy sector and water treatment facilities, alongside “a wide range of malicious cyber activities with growing severity.”

front.note: Britse en EU-sancties tegen Russische FSB-eenheid voor Polen-cyberaanval.
front.label: onderzoek

article.title: Inside Israel’s Secret Operation to Cultivate Ahmadinejad
article.summary: The yearslong effort to groom the former Iranian president as an intelligence asset culminated in a dramatic effort to take him to an Israeli safe house in the early days of the war. But the plan fell apart.

front.note: NYT onthult hoe Israël jarenlang Ahmadinejad als inlichtingenbron cultiveerde.
front.label: scoop

article.title: Hongaars parlement stemt voor afzetting president en Orbán-vertrouweling Sulyok
article.summary: Het Hongaarse parlement heeft ingestemd met een grondwetswijziging waarmee president Sulyok kan worden afgezet. In totaal stemden 139 parlementariërs voor de wijziging en 6 tegen. De partij van de voormalige premier Orbán boycotte de stemming. Premier Magyar wil met het afzetten van Sulyok de invloed van de voormalige

front.note: Hongaars parlement zet Orbán-loyale president Sulyok af via grondwetswijziging.
front.label: breaking

items.title: Ukraine’s army gets a performance review
items.summary: New defence minister Mykhailo Fedorov is trying to reform the army. The generals are unimpressed

items.title: Russia sanctions package pushed toward midweek deadline
items.summary: EU foreign ministers failed to sign off on 21st sanctions round. Wednesday is the last day to lock in an oil price cap.

items.title: Hamas Forces Interfered With Aid Distribution, U.N. Says
items.summary: A raid by armed personnel led the World Food Program to suspend its operations in one part of Gaza, the U.N. said. Hamas disputed the accusations.

items.title: EU capitals fail to force Commission’s hand on Israeli settler sanctions
items.summary: Countries trying to force the Commission into giving EU countries concrete measures to vote on were unable to do so.

items.title: Brussel en Berlijn geven geen krimp: EU blijft importeren uit Israëlische nederzettingen
items.summary: De economisch kleine, maar politiek omstreden handel tussen Europa en de illegale Israëlische nederzettingen op de bezette Westelijke Jordaanoever gaat door. Een grote groep EU-landen wil een verbod, maar Ursula von der Leyen en Berlijn liggen dwars.

items.title: Tice finally gauges the mood on the death of Ann Widdecombe | John Crace
items.summary: After a wild attack on the media, Reform’s deputy leader joins other MPs in the Commons offering tributes rather than speculation

items.title: Inside ICE’s Largest Detention Center
items.summary: On a military base in West Texas, where the government has built a sprawling tent complex to hold thousands of immigrants, deprivation and dire conditions are part of the design.

items.title: Donald Trump’s Needless War with Iran Is His Biggest Economic Blunder
items.summary: As the midterm elections approach, gas prices have started to rise again, and the President’s poll ratings are in the cellar.

items.title: US immigration agents involved in another fatal shooting
items.summary: An ICE agent fatally shot a 26-year-old Colombian man in the town of Biddeford, Maine, on Monday – only one week after a different ICE agent shot and killed a Mexican man in Texas. Maine Senator Angus King demanded a transparent investigation, but pointed out that the agents involved had not been wearing body cameras.

items.title: Over de status van dat ene grasveld in Ter Apel bakkeleien overheden al jaren
Verdachte in nieuw frituurvet­schandaal blijkt neef van ‘Veluwse vetkoning’
items.summary: De neef van de veroordeelde ‘Veluwse vetkoning’ Cees Bunschoten is nu ook verdachte in een grote biodieselfraudezaak. Gerrit Bunschoten zou via zijn bedrijf Gerbuvet voor miljoenen gefraudeerd hebben met biodiesel. De vetinzamelaar zou vetten bewust verkeerd hebben gelabeld, om ze duurzamer voor te stellen.

items.summary: The National Counterterrorism Center says Valencia is Nemesio Oseguera’s successor and the new boss of an organization that generates $1 billion a year from drug trafficking

items.title: VPN service favored by ransomware groups is sanctioned by US
items.summary: The U.S. Treasury Department announced sanctions against First VPN Service (1VPNS) and its Ukrainian administrator for aiding ransomware groups. Separately, a Belarusian man was sanctioned for malware "cryptors."

items.summary: Het is de favoriete oneliner van armoedeorganisaties en beleidsmakers: armoede discrimineert niet en kan iedereen treffen. items.title: High levels of banned insecticides found in Nutella and imported honeys
items.summary: A new report by a non-profit and the French National Beekeeping Union reveals that French-produced honey is far less contaminated by acetamiprid and other neonicotinoids. French senators are seeking to reauthorize these banned insecticides in a bill under discussion.

items.title: The Pentagon is blocking more than 150 wind projects over drone fears
items.summary: The Trump administration claims wind turbines pose a national security threat. The industry says it's pure politics.

items.summary: Worsening climate impacts, corporate greenwashing, and slow government action have driven communities across Asia to the courts.

items.title: Cutting back vines lets recovering forests grow faster, Borneo study shows
items.summary: As the world faces the twin crises of climate change and biodiversity loss, researchers are trying to understand how to restore degraded forests to most effectively sequester carbon, benefit biodiversity, and promote sustainable land use. items.title: Datacenter Microsoft gebruikt 1 procent van alle Nederlandse stroom, Google wil geen inzage geven in verbruik
items.summary: Microsoft geeft als eerste grote Amerikaanse partij inzicht in het stroomverbruik van zijn datacenters in Nederland. Dat is groot, en groeit de komende jaren bovendien hard. Terwijl andere datacenteruitbaters zwijgen, verhardt de strijd om toekomstige aansluitingen op het stroomnet.

items.summary: There's a separate $1,750 rebate for used EVs, but both rebates have a price cap.

items.summary: A Tesla representative at a DC hearing said the vehicle is “an active product being built.” But its timeline isn’t clear.
